title: Build a basic LED circuit
description: Learn electronics basics by safely wiring an LED on a breadboard.

dialogue.text: Hey there! I'm Orion. Want to see how easy electronics can be? Let's build a simple LED circuit together.
You'll need a breadboard, two jumper wires, an LED, and a 220 ohm resistor. We'll power it with a battery pack or USB cable. Disconnect power while building. Ready to put it together?

Place the LED on the breadboard with the long leg on the positive side. Attach the 220 ohm resistor in series, then use jumper wires to connect power and ground. Check polarity and keep power off until the wiring is secure. When everything's set, apply power and the LED should glow.
Great job! You've built your first circuit and lit up an LED. Always disconnect power before making changes.
